ddls:
CREATE TABLE "temperature_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Recorded temperature value */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded temperature */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the recorded temperature */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_records_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_records_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate variable (e.g., Temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source or organization */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government agency, research institute) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for inquiries */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the climate study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_studies_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_variables" (
  "study_variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study variable association */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated climate study */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate variable being studied */,
  "importance" REAL /* Importance score of the variable in the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_variables_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES climate_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_variables_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES climate_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Details of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES temperature_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the temperature record associated with the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_value" REAL /* Value indicating the extent of the anomaly */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly (e.g., high, low) */,
  "anomaly_severity" REAL /* Severity of the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_anomalies_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES temperature_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related climate study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_reports_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES climate_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated climate study */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partner organization involved in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was established */,
  "collaboration_details" TEXT /* Details of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES collaborating_organizations ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES climate_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborating_organizations" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., university, NGO) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate policy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country implementing the policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "enforcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was enforced */,
  "policy_document_url" TEXT /* URL of the policy document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_policies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
